Dispatches: Police Raid on Journalists' Homes in Georgia

July 14, 2026 9:30AM EDT | Dispatches

Georgian Authorities Should Immediately End Harassment of Independent Media

Share this via Facebook

Early on July 13, 2026, Georgian police raided the homes of three independent journalists in Tbilisi, seizing laptops and phones without a warrant.

The raids followed the journalists' reporting on alleged corruption within the Interior Ministry.

Region / Country
  • Europe/Central Asia
  • Georgia
Topic
  • Press Freedom
